revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-240

An indication of an object on a display that does not correspond to the presence of an actual object at the point indicated.


Note: This term is also used for "Echo box" in U.S.A. (4-3-170).

Reference: I.C.A.O.

{{IALAFooter}}
